name: @edgecommons/edge-console-workspace
description: Edge Console workspace: server (Node backend on @edgecommons/edgecommons), ui (IBM Carbon/React), protocol (shared WS API + envelope types).

scripts.build: npm run build -w protocol && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w ui
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w ui
scripts.coverage: npm run coverage -w server && npm run coverage -w ui
